title: surface-viewer widget params
description: Shared widget module for the 3d-viewer family (6+ widgets): parametric surfaces, polyhedra, and trajectories rendered as rotatable SVG via the page-global `make3DDraggable` + `proj3` helpers. Markup is a header + single `.row` of controls + SVG host + readout; the draw logic (integrating ODEs, computing curvature, wireframing surfaces) is widget-specific and carried verbatim as the `bodyScript` ARTIFACT. A portable React/Three.js consumer would discard `bodyScript` and re-implement each widget's math in its own renderer (e.g. via react-three-fiber), reading structural params (`controls`, `svgId`, `initialYaw`, `initialPitch`) plus eventually per-widget `draw` descriptors once they are lifted out of the artifact string. The `oneOf` dispatches between `standard` (the 5 differential-geometry widgets all share the same markup shape: hd / row of controls / svg / readout) and `bare` (idiosyncratic markup such as `w-su2path`'s nested SVG + matrix readout layout — carried as a `bodyMarkup` artifact).

label.description: Inner HTML of the <label>. When `labelFor` is true (default) the label is rendered with for=<id>; when false the label has no for attribute (select-style pattern).
Inner HTML of the <label>. By convention no `for=` is emitted for selects in this family (matches on-disk bytes).

hint.description: Optional .hint inner-HTML emitted in the header next to the title.

svgTitle.description: <title> child of <svg>. Defaults to `title` when omitted.

readoutInitial.description: Initial inner HTML of the readout <div>. Defaults to '' (empty, matching the 3d-viewer convention — the draw() fills it on mount).

controls.description: Controls rendered inside a single `.row` div above the SVG. Order is significant. Mix of sliders and selects.

initialYaw.description: Portable param consumed by make3DDraggable's opts.yaw. The bodyScript artifact still encodes this numerically; portable consumers read it from here.

initialPitch.description: Portable param consumed by make3DDraggable's opts.pitch.

meshDensity.description: Portable param: surface-wireframe densities. `dragging` is used while the user is rotating (decimated for FPS); `static` is used otherwise.

sectionComment.description: ARTIFACT. Raw text between the leading <script> tag and the IIFE opener, emitted as `/* <sectionComment> */`. Preserves the source's /* ============ §N … ============ */ banners.

bodyScript.x-artifact: per-widget 3D draw logic (integrators, ODE solvers, wireframe formulas) is bespoke; portable consumers implement their own in react-three-fiber or equivalent.
bodyScript.description: ARTIFACT. Verbatim JS statements inside `(function(){\n…\n})();`. Reads controls, calls `make3DDraggable(svg, draw, { yaw, pitch })`, projects via page-global `proj3`, builds SVG paths/polygons/text, and writes the readout.

bodyMarkup.x-artifact: widget body markup is too idiosyncratic to generalize (e.g. w-su2path's nested SVG + matrix readout layout); a portable consumer rebuilds its own layout.
bodyMarkup.description: ARTIFACT. Full inner HTML of the `<div class="widget" id="...">` wrapper (everything between the opening and closing tags, verbatim).

bodyScript.description: ARTIFACT. Verbatim IIFE body. Same rationale as standard.bodyScript.
